section_name: Cooperation with Other State or Canada
text:
(a) The department shall send a certified copy of the record of the department’s action suspending a nonresident’s operating privilege under Subchapter F or under Sections 601.332 (Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Nonresident’s Operating Privilege for Unsatisfied Judgment) , 601.333 (Relief from Suspension: Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) , and 601.334 (Relief from Suspension: Consent of Judgment Creditor) to the official in charge of issuing driver’s licenses and vehicle registrations of the state or province of Canada in which the nonresident resides.

(b) Subsection (a) applies only if the law of the other state or the province provides for action similar to the action required by Section 601.009 (Report from Other State or Canada) .
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 601. Motor Vehicle Safety Responsibility Act
##### § 601.375 — Cooperation with Other State or Canada

(a) The department shall send a certified copy of the record of the department’s action suspending a nonresident’s operating privilege under Subchapter F or under Sections 601.332 (Suspension of Driver’s License and Vehicle Registration or Nonresident’s Operating Privilege for Unsatisfied Judgment) , 601.333 (Relief from Suspension: Motor Vehicle Liability Insurance) , and 601.334 (Relief from Suspension: Consent of Judgment Creditor) to the official in charge of issuing driver’s licenses and vehicle registrations of the state or province of Canada in which the nonresident resides.

(b) Subsection (a) applies only if the law of the other state or the province provides for action similar to the action required by Section 601.009 (Report from Other State or Canada) .

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
